task.title: Issuing TSO commands
task.shortdesc: You can issue TSO commands on the remote system from your workstation.

taskbody.prereq: Before you issue TSO commands, you must connect to the z/OS system. The TSO command shell supports interactive TSO command submission if the RSED daemon is configured to use Interactive ISPF Gateway. Contact your z/OS Systems Programmer to learn if Interactive ISPF Gateway is configured.

steps.stepsection: To issue a TSO EXEC command, follow these steps:

step.cmd: In the Remote System view, expand the remote system.
In the Command field, type an EXEC command and press Enter.

ul.li: MYSCRIPT is a REXX script you wrote

step.stepresult: The command is sent to the server. Control is returned to you while the command processes in the background. The result of the command is displayed.
